hook.text: BARCELONA HAVE 4 DAYS TO SIGN RASHFORD

beats.text: PAY £26M BY JUNE 15 OR HE COMES HOME
BARCA WANT ANOTHER LOAN BUT UNITED SAY NO
14 GOALS AND 14 ASSISTS IN SPAIN THIS SEASON

caption: Barcelona have until June 15 to pay £26m for Rashford or he returns to Old Trafford, per BBC Sport. Pay up, another loan, or bring him home? 🔴
